docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $0.00 - SERVED JUL-11-2020, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LOPEZ, FRANK
